name: Ciel Grinberryall
alt_names: シエルグ・リンベリオール
description: Ciel Grinberryall was the Queen of the Spade Kingdom, alongside her husband Loyce Grinberryall until the Zogratis Siblings attacked the palace and overthrew the royal family. ~!It is later revealed by Ralph Niaflem, that she is the mother of Yuno.!~
